-(%0A        %22fmt%22%0A        %22bufio%22%0A        %22os%22%0A        %22strconv%22%0A        %22strings%22%0A)%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A    scanner.Split(bufio.ScanWords)%0A%0A    for scanner.Scan() %7B%0A        n, _ := strconv.Atoi(scanner.Text())%0A        vetor := make(%5B%5Dint, n)%0A        for i := 0; i %3C n; i ++ %7B%0A            scanner.Scan()%0A            vetor%5Bi%5D, _= strconv.Atoi(scanner.Text())%0A        %7D%0A        var maisRepetidos %5B%5Dstring%0A        maxFrequencia := 0%0A        contaAtual := 1%0A%0A        for i := 1; i %3C= n; i++ %7B%0A            if i == n %7C%7C vetor%5Bi%5D != vetor%5Bi-1%5D %7B%0A                if contaAtual %3E maxFrequencia %7B%0A                    maxFrequencia = contaAtual%0A                    maisRepetidos = %5B%5Dstring%7Bstrconv.Itoa(vetor%5Bi-1%5D)%7D%0A                %7D else if contaAtual == maxFrequencia%7B%0A                    maisRepetidos = append(maisRepetidos,strconv.Itoa(vetor%5Bi-1%5D))%0A                %7D%0A                contaAtual = 1%0A            %7D else %7B%0A                contaAtual++%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A        if len(maisRepetidos) == 0 %7B%0A            fmt.Println(%22%5B %5D%22)%0A        %7D else %7B%0A            fmt.Printf(%22%5B %25s %5D%5Cn%22, strings.Join(maisRepetidos, %22 %22))%0A        %7D%0A    %7D
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22)
